seoTitle: How to Create a Home Page in Power BI
metaDescription: Build a clear home page in Power BI with buttons and links so users can navigate reports easily and find the data they need faster.
intro: A well-organized home page gives users a clear entry point into a Power BI report instead of leaving them to hunt through multiple pages for the data they need. This guide walks through setting up a home page with buttons and links for smooth navigation. It's especially valuable for larger reports used by different teams.

steps.heading: Plan your home page layout
steps.body: Decide which pages or sections users will need to reach most often, since this shapes how the home page should be organized.

steps.heading: Set up buttons and links
steps.body: Add navigation buttons to the home page and connect them to the relevant report pages or bookmarks.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for navigation
steps.body: Keep labels clear and group related buttons together so users can find their way around without confusion.

steps.heading: Address different team use cases
steps.body: Tailor sections of the home page for different teams, giving each group quick access to the information they rely on daily.

steps.heading: Integrate automation features
steps.body: Where possible, tie the home page into automated data refreshes so it always reflects current information for anyone landing there.

faq.question: Do I need advanced skills to build a home page in Power BI?
faq.answer: No, a home page mainly relies on standard buttons, links, and layout choices that beginners can follow with practice.

faq.question: Can different teams have their own sections on the home page?
faq.answer: Yes, you can organize buttons and links into sections tailored to different teams' needs on the same home page.

faq.question: Should the home page include data visuals or just navigation?
faq.answer: It's common to focus mainly on navigation, though adding a few key summary visuals can also work well depending on your audience.

faq.question: How do I keep the home page updated as I add new report pages?
faq.answer: You'll need to manually add new buttons or links as pages are added, so it's worth reviewing the home page periodically.

faq.question: Can a home page improve adoption of a Power BI report?
faq.answer: Yes, a clear home page makes reports feel more approachable, which can help more users engage with the data confidently.
